actual_questions: The meal could be classified into different expense accounts depending on its business purpose: Meals & Entertainment (client meals), Travel Expenses (employee travel meals), Office Expenses (staff meetings), Employee Benefits (team events), or other categories.
hard_27_meal_purpose.reason: Identified the ambiguity and listed possible interpretations that map to the expected cases. Substance is correct — reasoning was in the reason field rather than clarification_questions (format compliance issue, not substance).
